title: Old containers/podman quay tags are not available
body: ### Issue Description I see only some of the tags are recreated after issue #19799 I still don't see some of the old tags recreated. Example 4.5.0. Can I know what's the ETA for this? ### Steps to reproduce the issue https://quay.io/repository/containers/podman?tab=history ### Describe the results you received NA ### Describe the results you expected Describe the results you expected ### podman info output ```yaml NA ``` ### Podman in a container No ### Privileged Or Rootless None ### Upstream Latest Release Yes ### Additional environment details Additional environment details ### Additional information Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: @cevich can we put a priority on this for our users?

Please follow [the current status on the discussion](https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/19796).  Specifically, there are so many old tags, I need a script to do the (fairly complex) validation process.  That's in progress now and is my top priority (in addition to watching for related issues :wink:).
